chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Civil Appeal No.S-04 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1. hearing of main case 2.For hearing of CMA 32/2022 25-03-2024 None present for the appellant. ***** Since filing of this appeal, record reflects that appellant and his counsel have remained absent despite note of caution. Again today, also no one is present; no intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this 1st Civil Appeal along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
